
### example 3  {.smaller}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width=30%}

```
unsigned a, b;
void foo(unsigned c) {
    int *p;
    if (a > 100) {
        p = &a;
    } else {
        p = &b;
    }
    *p += c;
    assert(a + b == c);
}
```

:::

::: {.column width=69%}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example-ptr.figure.svg){width=550px}

:::

::::
